source: New Jersey Board of Public Utilities
source_note: Decision and Order Adopting Initial Decision and Stipulation on the verified petition of Jersey Central Power & Light Company (JCP&L) for increases in its electric rates (2023 base-rate filing), NJ BPU Docket No. ER23030144 / OAL PUC 3346-23, issued at the February 14, 2024 agenda meeting.
